title: WHERE condition ignored after 2 LEFT JOINs with subqueries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE dept (deptno INT PRIMARY KEY, dname VARCHAR(15), loc VARCHAR(15));
SELECT e.ename, d.dname FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.deptno = d.deptno WHERE d.loc = 'DALLAS' OR e.sal > 2000.00 ORDER BY e.ename;
key_bug_features: WHERE condition ignored after multiple LEFT JOINs
